calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert C. Valmonte, Defendant appeared in Propria Persona
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
